ListItem.Para: MEDC Channel A is deactivated.
MEDC Channel B operates normally on both engines.
Associated engine oil quantity indicating system is considered inoperative.
Associated hydraulic engine driven pump supply shutoff valve is verified to operate normally.
Repairs are made within three flight days.

Note.Para: Associated fire/overheat detection system for the affected engine will operate in single channel mode, annunciated by DET FIRE xA ENG L/R status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 26-11-01.

Associated engine anti-ice is inoperative annunciated by the EAI PRSOV L/R and EAI PRSOV CONTROLLER L/R status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 30-21-01, 30-21-01-01, or 30-21-01-02.
Associated hydraulic system pressure indication is inoperative accompanied by the HYD SYS PRESS SNSR L/R status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-31-01.
Associated EMP temperature indication is inoperative accompanied by the HYD TEMP IND DEM L/R status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-32-01.
Associated thrust reverser is inoperative, annunciated by ENG REVERSER L/R status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 78-31-01.
Associated engine oil quantity indication will be blank. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 79-31-01.

Associated Variable Frequency Starter Generator is inoperative annunciated by ELEC GEN SYS L1/R1 status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 24-22-01-01, 24-22-01-02, or 24-22-01-03.
Associated Duct Leak Overheat Detection Channel is inoperative annunciated by DET EAI LEAK L/R CHAN A status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL items 26-18-01 or 26-18-01-01.

Associated engine anti-ice is inoperative annunciated by the EAI PRESS SENSOR L1/R1 and EAI PRESS SENSOR L2/R2 status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL items 30-21-01, 30-21-01-06, or 30-21-01-07.
Associated hybraulic reservoir auto-bleed valve system is inoperative annunciated by HYD VLV AUTO BLEED RSVR L/R. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-31-03.

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the appropriate circuit breaker and lock with an INOP tag.
For the left engine MEDC channel inoperative, MEDC CHAN A L ENGINE.
For the right engine MEDC channel inoperative, MEDC CHAN A R ENGINE.

Note.Para: Associated hydraulic engine driven pump supply shutoff valve position indication may be degraded, annunciated by HYD VLV SUPPLY PRI PUMP L (R) status message.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the associated engine driven pump supply shutoff valve (ESSOV) operates normally (AMM DDG 26-11-02).

ListItem.Para: Make sure the P8 panel engine fire switch handle for the associated engine is in the down and locked position.
Push the P5 panel HYDRAULIC PRIMARY L(R) ENG switch to the ON position.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the open position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is OPEN.
Push the P8 panel manual override switch, then pull out the associated engine fire switch handle.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the closed position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is CLOSED.
Push down the associated engine fire switch handle.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the open position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is OPEN.
MEDC Channel B is deactivated.
MEDC Channel A operates normally on both engines.
Associated hydraulic engine driven pump supply shutoff valve is verified to operate normally.

Note.Para: Associated fire/overheat detection system for the affected engine will operate in single channel mode, annunciated by DET FIRE xB ENG L/R status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 26-11-01.
Associated hydraulic EMP pressure indication will be inoperative accompanied by the HYD PRESS IND DEM L/R status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-31-02.
Associated hydraulic reservoir temperature indication will be inoperative accompanied by the HYD TEMP IND RSVR L/R status message. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-18-04.
Associated thrust reverser system is inoperative, annunciated by ENG REVERSER L,R status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 78-31-01.

Associated Variable Frequency Starter Generator is inoperative annunciated by ELEC GEN SYS L2/R2 status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 24-22-01-01, 24-22-01-02, or 24-22-01-03.
Associated Duct Leak Overheat Detection Channel is inoperative annunciated by DET EAI LEAK L/R CHAN B status messages. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL items 26-18-01 or 26-18-01-01.
Associated hybraulic reservoir auto-bleed valve system is inoperative annunciated by HYD VLV AUTO BLEED RSVR L/R. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 29-31-03.

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the appropriate circuit breaker and lock with an INOP tag.
For the left engine MEDC channel inoperative, MEDC CHAN B L ENGINE.
For the right engine MEDC channel inoperative, MEDC CHAN B R ENGINE.

Note.Para: Associated hydraulic engine driven pump supply shutoff valve position indication may be degraded, annunciated by HYD VLV SUPPLY PRI PUMP L (R) status message.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the associated engine driven pump supply shutoff valve (ESSOV) operates normally (AMM DDG 26-11-02).

ListItem.Para: Make sure the P8 panel engine fire switch handle for the associated engine is in the down and locked position.
Push the P5 panel HYDRAULIC PRIMARY L(R) ENG switch to the ON position.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the open position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is OPEN.
Push the P8 panel manual override switch, then pull out the associated engine fire switch handle.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the closed position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is CLOSED.
Push down the associated engine fire switch handle.
Make sure the position indicator on the ESSOV is in the open position.
On the hydraulic maintenance display, make sure the HYDRAULIC PRIMARY PUMP S/O VLV L(R) is OPEN.
